name: HAL Voice Kiosk
description: Voice assistant channel — receives STT text from a HAL kiosk via HTTP webhook, routes through the agent, and pushes TTS responses back to the kiosk.

halServerUrl.description: Base URL of the HAL AI server (e.g. http://10.20.30.185:8765)

hal-voice.label: HAL Voice Kiosk
hal-voice.description: Voice assistant kiosk with STT/TTS and a display (the orb).

halServerUrl.label: HAL Server URL
halServerUrl.help: Base URL of the HAL AI server REST API.

dmPolicy.label: DM Policy
dmPolicy.help: Access control for voice commands. 'open' accepts all.
